label: XDF Catalog — Paramètres non E85 (auto-généré depuis BMW_Siemens_MSV70_9PPL921S_2560K.xdf)
description: Auto-généré par generate_xdf_catalog.py. Contient les stubs de toutes les catégories XDF non couvertes par e85_knowledge.json. Tous les paramètres sont marqués modification_e85=NON.

parameters.ip_lamb_scc: lambda setpoint for single cylinder shut off

parameters.c_vcc_dr_max_vvl: Starts the short circuit check if power supply is greater treshold

parameters.c_ang_sp_bol_ad_vvl_cus: Minimal allowed setpoint during adaptation mode
parameters.c_ang_sp_tol_ad_vvl_cus: Maximal allowed setpoint in the adaptation mode
parameters.c_ang_sp_vel_fast_vvl_cus: Pre-control value for velocity control with fast velocity
parameters.c_ang_sp_vel_slow_vvl_cus: Pre-control value for velocity control with slow velocity
parameters.c_vel_fast_ad_vvl_cus: Maximal allowed gradient for fast velocity during adaptation routine
parameters.c_vel_slow_ad_vvl_cus: Maximal allowed gradient for slow velocity during adaptation routine

parameters.lc_clr_his_fmy: Set this calibration to 1 for clearing the history memory
parameters.c_ang_1_bol_win_out_vvl: reference point for sensor1 learning window at bol
parameters.c_ang_2_bol_win_out_vvl: reference point for sensor2 learning window at bol
parameters.c_ang_ad_vel_lim_vvl: distance between learning window and switching to drive with limited velocity
parameters.c_ang_de_auth_ad_vvl: authorized deviation of the actual value to accept the new learned value
parameters.c_ang_dist_secu_ad_vvl: secure distance in the near of the limits
parameters.c_ang_sp_ad_max_vvl: max. setpoint value during adaptation routine
parameters.c_ang_sp_ad_min_vvl: min. setpoint value during adaptation routine
parameters.c_ang_tol_win_out_vvl: reference point for learning window at tol
parameters.c_ctr_vvl_psn_ad_con: minimum time threshold to identify a successful learning of the mechanical limit
parameters.c_tco_min_vvl_ad: Threshold of motor temperature for activation of adaption routine
parameters.c_vcc_min_vvl_ad: threshold of supply voltage kl87a for activation of adaptation routine
parameters.lc_ad_clr_vvl_ad_value: Calibration data to reset vvl adaptation values
parameters.lc_ad_clr_vvl_state_nvmy: Calibration data to reset adaptation status flags

parameters.c_dly_inh_iv_mis: Delay for MIL blinking in case of misfiring present failure with cylinder cut off
parameters.c_dly_mil_ready_1: Delay to start MIL blinking for readiness display during pre-drive check
parameters.c_dly_mil_ready_2: MIL blink duration for readiness display during pre-drive check
parameters.lc_inh_wal_st: Bolean to inhibit illumination of all lamps during pre-drive check mode
parameters.c_abc_inc_ang_plaus_chk_vvl: Anti bounce counter increment for diagnosis of VVL-sensor position plausibility
parameters.c_abc_inc_sens_err_vvl: Anti bounce increment for diagnosis of VVL-sensor failures
parameters.c_abc_inc_sens_vvl: Anti bounce counter increment for summarised sensor errors
parameters.c_abc_inc_spi_par_vvl: Anti bounce counter increment for diagnosis of SPI parity failures
parameters.c_abc_inc_vcc_sens_vvl: Anti bounce counter increment for VVL sensor diagnosis
parameters.c_abc_max_ang_plaus_chk_vvl: Anti bounce maximum value for diagnosis of VVL-sensor position plausibility
parameters.c_abc_max_sens_err_vvl: Anti bounce maximum value for diagnosis of VVL-sensor failures
parameters.c_abc_max_sens_vvl: Anti bounce maximum value for summarised sensor errors
parameters.c_abc_max_spi_par_vvl: Anti bounce maximum value for diagnosis of SPI parity failure
parameters.c_abc_max_vcc_sens_vvl: Anti bounce maximum value for diagnosis of VVL sensor VCC
parameters.c_ang_plaus_chk_de_vvl: Max. allowed deviation for diagnosis of VVL-sensor position plausibility
parameters.c_vcc_max_sens_vvl: Max. voltage threshold of VVL sensor VCC for diagnosis
parameters.c_vcc_min_sens_vvl: Min. voltage threshold of VVL sensor VCC for diagnosis

parameters.c_t_ast_cst_rbm: Minimum comulative time since engine start for RBM cold start condition
parameters.c_tam_max_cst_rbm: Maximum ambient temperature threshold for for RBM cold start condition
parameters.c_tam_min_cst_rbm: Minimum ambient temperature threshold for RBM cold start condition
parameters.c_tam_st_hys_cst_rbm: Ambient temperature hysteresis for RBM cold start condition
parameters.c_tco_st_max_cst_rbm: Maximum engine start temperature threshold for RBM cold start condition
parameters.c_tco_st_min_cst_rbm: Minimum engine start temperature threshold for RBM cold start condition
parameters.lc_rbm_clr: Reinit the rate base monitoring statistics LC_RBM_CLR 0->1
parameters.lc_sens_rot_vvl: Deactivation of the function Rotation Sensor

parameters.c_ctr_scdn_equ_dc_max: Maximum value of the driving cycle counter for similar conditions erase
parameters.c_load_scdn_equ: LOAD value for similar conditions detection (typical 20%)
parameters.c_n_scdn_equ: engine speed threshold for similar conditions detection (375 rpm)
parameters.lc_ena_scdn: Boolean to indicate if similar conditions are inhibited (0) or not (1)
parameters.c_ang_1_bol_de_min_vvl: max. difference between old and new bol value of sensor1 in case of learning using a small plausibility window
parameters.c_ang_1_bol_win_max_vvl: Big plausibility window for BOL value of sensor 1
parameters.c_ang_1_bol_win_min_vvl: small plausibility window for BOL value of sensor 1
parameters.c_ang_1_tol_win_vvl: plausibility window for TOL value of sensor 1
parameters.c_ang_2_bol_de_min_vvl: max. difference between old and new bol value of sensor2 in case of learning using a small plausibility window
parameters.c_ang_2_bol_win_max_vvl: Big plausibility window for BOL value of sensor 2
parameters.c_ang_2_bol_win_min_vvl: small plausibility window for BOL value of sensor 2
parameters.c_ang_2_tol_win_vvl: plausibility window for TOL value of sensor 2
parameters.c_ang_ad_de_min_vvl: min difference between old and new value, to authorize saving the new values

parameters.ip_tps_sp_es: Throttle position setpoint for engine stopped
parameters.ip_tps_sp_pwl: throttle position setpoint during post operating phase
parameters.c_pv_av_ext_adj_min: Min. threshold for external ajustment about PV_AV
parameters.c_tps_sp_ext_adj_ena: Variable enabled for throttle position setpoint manual or about PV_AV
parameters.c_ang_de_ad_stnd_vvl: Additional threshold for sensor value linearization during
parameters.c_ang_noise_vvl: maximum threshold for cutting noises of the sensor

parameters.c_mtcpwm_close_max: duty cycle limitation at bottom mechanical limit
parameters.c_mtcpwm_hold_vvl_pctl: max. duty cycle for holding etc in open position during etc_lih_4
parameters.c_mtcpwm_hys: hysteresis to prevent MTCPWM-switching according to VB-changes
parameters.c_mtcpwm_i_add: Init value for I-Part while TPS_SP_LIH_DIF is crossing LH
parameters.c_mtcpwm_inc_vvl_pctl: duty cycle increment for increasing mtcpwm during etc_lih_4
parameters.c_mtcpwm_open_vvl_pctl: max. duty cycle for opening etc during etc_lih_4
parameters.c_t_mtcpwm_close_act_max: Timer threshold for switching to closing duty cycle
parameters.c_t_mtcpwm_open_vvl_pctl: Timer-threshold for switching to hold duty cycle during ETC_LIH_4
parameters.c_tps_sp_lih_dif_hys: Hysteresis for detection of direction change
parameters.c_tps_sp_stop_max: threshold for testing duty cycle on value

parameters.c_tps_av_bol: Lower limit (actual value) of the closing speed limitation of the throttle setpoint
parameters.c_tps_av_tol: Upper limit (actual value) of the closing speed limitation of the throttle setpoint
parameters.c_tps_sp_bol: Lower limit of opening velocity limitation the throttle position setpoint
parameters.c_tps_sp_bol_tps_ad_req: Lower limit of opening velocity limitation the throttle position setpoint without throttle Adaptation
parameters.c_tps_sp_lgrd_stop: max. admissable gradient of throtle setpoint in the range of the top and bottom stop
parameters.c_tps_sp_max: Upper limit of the throttle position setpoint
parameters.c_tps_sp_max_tps_ad_req: Upper limit of the throttle position setpoint without throttle Adaptation
parameters.c_tps_sp_min: Lower limit of the throttle position setpoint
parameters.c_tps_sp_min_tps_ad_req: Lower limit of the throttle position setpoint without throttle Adaptation
parameters.c_tps_sp_tol: Upper limit of opening velocity limitation the throttle position setpoint
parameters.c_tps_sp_tol_tps_ad_req: Upper limit of opening velocity limitation the throttle position setpoint without throttle Adaptation
parameters.K_UVVTBG: maximale Spannung aus Regler bei LR-Begrenzung aktiv
parameters.K_DEXWINK: Schwelle minimale Regelabweichung für Einrechnung Omex
parameters.K_EXWINKHILO: Schwelle Umschaltung Polynom für kleine und große Winkel
parameters.K_DEXWINKUMA: Kleinster Winkel bezogen auf unterer mechanischer Anschlag (0°)
